title: WikiMap
description: Schema for WikiMaps interactive map content stored on pages in the Map: namespace.

mapImage.description: File title of the background image (without the File: namespace prefix). Must be uploaded to the wiki. Supported formats: .jpg, .jpeg, .png, .svg.

description.description: Short text description of the map. Supports basic wikitext (links, formatting).

mapBounds.description: Bounding box defining the coordinate extent of the map as [[minX, minY], [maxX, maxY]]. The aspect ratio of the bounds should match the source image to avoid stretching.

coordinateOrder.description: Order of coordinate pairs throughout the map data.

categories.description: Marker categories shown in the filter list.

markers.description: Map markers. Each must reference a defined category by its id.

pageCategories.description: Wiki categories to place the map page in (without the Category: prefix).

defaultSort.description: Custom sort key for category pages. Defaults to the page name.

name.description: Display name shown in the filter list.

color.description: Hex color (e.g. #ff00ff) or CSS named color for the default marker pin.

symbol.description: Single Unicode character or emoji displayed on the default pin.

symbolColor.description: Color of the symbol. Required when symbol is set.

icon.description: File title of a custom icon (32-64px, .svg/.png/.jpg). Replaces the default pin.

listId.description: Sort order in the filter list.

categoryId.description: ID of the category this marker belongs to.

position.description: Coordinate position [x, y] within mapBounds (or [y, x] if coordinateOrder is yx).

icon.description: File title of a custom icon that overrides the category icon.

title.description: Marker title displayed in the popup.

description.description: Popup body text. Supports basic wikitext.

link.description: Internal wiki link shown in the popup.

url.description: Article title (or Article#Section) to link to.

image.description: File title of an image shown in the popup.
